notes: remote.rs (code_review/diff_state): six 'safe:'/'full:' literals (lines 231/232/253/254/271/272) are arguments to warp_core::safe_error! — an error-logging/telemetry macro, not a UI surface; flag telemetry_payload. Line 345 'Server reported diff error' is the `error:` field of CodeReviewTelemetryEvent::LoadDiffFailed sent via send_telemetry_from_ctx! — telemetry dimension value, flag telemetry_payload. event.rs:441 'BlockWorkingDirectoryUpdated({:?}, Done bootstrapping: {:?})' is a Debug-impl write!(f, ...) format string for Event — developer diagnostic logging, not user-facing; flag telemetry_payload (placeholders {:?} would be preserved anyway, but no translation per §11).
